name: code-audit
description: Standalone code audit skills that produce markdown reports and remediation plans without requiring agile-workflow or any .work substrate.

interface.longDescription: Doc-producing code audit skills with no agile-workflow substrate dependency: deep-code-scan for multi-lane campaigns, bug-scan for correctness hunts, security-scan for vulnerability review, test-scan for coverage and test quality, perf-scout for speculative optimization ideas, bold-refactor for architectural reconception plans, and repo-eval for verified scorecards. Outputs are markdown reports and remediation plans, not .work items.
defaultPrompt: Use code-audit to scan this repository and write markdown findings.
